description: A nonlinear current–voltage characteristic observed under near room temperature conditions.

observed_coordinates.evidence: Current increases slowly from 1.0e-12 A at 0.0 V to 4.5e-12 A at 1.5 V.
Current increases sharply from 1.0e-9 A at 1.6 V to 1.0e-5 A at 2.0 V.
Current increases gradually from 1.0e-5 A at 2.0 V to 9.6e-3 A at 5.0 V.

important_note: This file describes observed behavior only and does not assert any physical transport mechanism.
